posting.sourceTitle: North Atlantic States Carpenters Training Fund
posting.sponsorName: North Atlantic States Carpenters Training Fund
posting.locationSummary: NASCTF jurisdiction across much of New York State, excluding Nassau, Suffolk, and the five boroughs of New York City
posting.applicationSummary: Apply online at nasctf.org during the recruitment period, but first attend an in-person information session to receive a passcode required for the application.
posting.applicationHours: Application assistance by phone is available Monday through Friday, 9:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m.
posting.applicationLimitDetails: Applications are limited and accepted on a first-come, first-served basis.
posting.ageRequirement: Applicants must be at least 17 years old.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must live in the geographical jurisdiction of NASCTF: Clinton, Essex, Franklin, Hamilton, Albany, Columbia, Fulton, Greene, Montgomery, Rensselaer, Saratoga, Schenectady, Schoharie, Warren, Washington, Dutchess, Orange, Putnam, Rockland, Sullivan, Ulster, Westchester, Allegany, Cattaraugus, Chautauqua, Erie, Niagara, Orleans, Genesee, Wyoming, Monroe, Livingston, Wayne, Ontario, Chemung, Schuyler, Steuben, Tompkins, Yates, Seneca, Cayuga, Cortland, Onondaga, Madison, Oswego, Broome, Chenango, Delaware, Otsego, Tioga, Oneida, Herkimer, Jefferson, Lewis, and St. Lawrence counties. Nassau, Suffolk, and the five boroughs of New York City are excluded.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must be willing to travel to job sites in various counties within the jurisdiction and to required classes statewide, and must have reliable transportation to and from job sites and classes.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a drug test at the sponsor’s expense after selection and before enrollment. Applicants who test positive cannot reapply for one year.
posting.classRequirement: Must be willing to attend required classes at the approved school and travel to various locations statewide.
allRequirements: Must be at least 17 years old.

Must attest in writing that they are physically able to perform the work of a carpenter, including working on scaffolds and in confined spaces, working in inclement weather, performing constant repetitive motions, climbing and working from heights, lifting at least 50 lbs., and standing and stooping for prolonged periods.
Must pass a drug test at the sponsor’s expense after selection and before enrollment in apprenticeship. If the applicant tests positive, they cannot reapply for one year.
Must live in the geographical jurisdiction of NASCTF, including the listed New York counties; Nassau, Suffolk, and the five boroughs of New York City are excluded.
Must be willing to travel to job sites in various counties within the jurisdiction.
Must be willing to attend required classes at the approved school and travel to various locations statewide.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must provide military transfer card or DD-214 discharge form, if applicable, after selection and before enrollment in apprenticeship.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 17, live in the NASCTF jurisdiction, be physically able to do carpenter work, have reliable transportation, attend required classes, and pass a sponsor-paid drug test.
posting.contactName: North Atlantic States Carpenters Training Fund
posting.contactSummary: North Atlantic States Carpenters Training Fund can answer apprenticeship questions by phone or through its website.
